name: ai-project-control
description: Local multi-project control plane for Codex, Claude Code, Ollama, Hermes, Graphify and Obsidian.

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check lib/integrations/graphify-runtime.js && node --check lib/providers/model-catalog.js && node --check public/app.js && node --check public/modules/graph-selection.js && node --check public/modules/model-selection.js && node --check public/modules/request-state.js && node --check public/modules/project-ui-state.js
scripts.test:node: node --test tests/graphify-runtime.test.js tests/model-catalog.test.js tests/task-metadata.test.js tests/system-updates.test.js tests/api-boundaries.test.js tests/api-job-recovery.test.js tests/api-jobs-sse.test.js tests/git-security-contract.test.js tests/git-security-remote-delete-hook.test.js tests/ui-graph-selection.test.js tests/ui-model-selection.test.js tests/ui-behavior-job-types.test.js tests/ui-behavior-project-switch-race.test.js
scripts.test: npm run check && npm run test:node && npm run test:router && npm run test:smoke
